name: French Bread Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 loaf sweet French bread - slice, approximately 1/2 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Place sliced French bread in a buttered 9x13 pan, filling any holes with smaller pieces of bread so the entire bottom is covered.
2. Mix eggs, cheese, milk, wine, and seasonings together. Pour over the bread.
3. Sprinkle sausage over the top.
4. Cover with foil and refrigerate overnight.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour. Makes two 9x13 casseroles.
